content:
- Read prior memory and current pass-3 task, found lifecycle marker `TO BE VERIFIED` and executed deep skeptical verification with 16 parallel tracks.
- Updated pass-3 plan to Draft 2, recorded skeptical verification deltas (moved `make test-real` earlier; required gate-log presence check), and promoted marker to `NOW EXECUTE`.
- Executed pass-3 meta-review run end-to-end: enforced model preflight to `deep_review`, created `.ralph/evidence/meta-18-pass3-20260303T022727Z`, ran 16-track skeptical audit artifacts, then ran `CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 make check/test/test-real/test-bdd/lint` with `set -o pipefail` + `tee` logs; all gates passed.
- Updated task 18 exploration with pass-3 preflight + full-review complete entries, reset model to `normal_high`, marked task 21 done with `<passing>true</passing>`, added a new AGENTS learning about single lifecycle-marker hygiene, ran `/bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh`.
- Next: commit all current changes (including `.ralph` evidence/progress artifacts) with required message `task finished 21-task-do-meta-deep-skeptical-review-pass-3: ...`.

- Read .ralph/current_tasks.md completely and scanned for pass/fail/meta-task markers.
- Verified all bug tasks currently show <passes>true</passes> and <passing>true</passing>; no failing bug blocks.
- Found one failing non-bug task: .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/16-task-debug-ui-verbose-state-actions-events-and-final-stop.md (<passes>false</passes>).
- Applied selection rules: failing tasks take precedence over meta-task; wrote selected path to .ralph/current_task.txt and stopped.
- Next cycle should execute task 16 work directly.

- Loaded startup memory, read `.ralph/current_task.txt`, and opened task 16 (`16-task-debug-ui-verbose-state-actions-events-and-final-stop.md`).
- Determined lifecycle state was pre-plan (no terminal marker), so I executed planning mode only.
- Ran broad parallel exploration across API/debug modules, worker contracts, tests, config schema, Makefile gates, and prior task evidence to build an execution-grade plan.
- Confirmed current debug path is text dump (`/debug/snapshot`) and no static HTML UI route exists yet; identified that core runtime state types are intentionally non-Serialize so DTO mapping should be used for verbose JSON.
- Wrote a full Draft 1 execution plan into task 16 with concrete file-level steps, test strategy, browser-smoke validation approach, failure protocol via `$add-bug`, full-gate evidence capture, and final STOP gating.
- Added exactly one lifecycle marker at end: `TO BE VERIFIED`.
- Next (for the verification phase): do deep skeptical review using 16+ parallel probes, change at least one plan item, and replace marker with `NOW EXECUTE` only after verification is complete.

- Opened current task 16 in TO BE VERIFIED state, ran deep skeptical verification with 16+ parallel probes, altered plan (mandatory test-real gate, debug route auth coverage, snapshot compatibility), and promoted marker to NOW EXECUTE.
- Implemented execution end-to-end: added structured verbose debug payload DTO (`src/debug_api/view.rs`), expanded debug snapshot model with sequence/change/timeline metadata, added bounded incremental history tracking in `src/debug_api/worker.rs`, and extended API routes with `/debug/verbose` (JSON + since query) and `/debug/ui` (visual HTML/CSS/JS).
- Added tests across layers: API unit tests for debug routes/auth/status behavior, debug worker unit tests for history semantics, BDD API test for debug UI/verbose TCP contract, and updated contract tests for new snapshot shape.
- Created browser validation artifacts by installing Playwright Chromium and capturing real `/debug/ui` screenshot via a live example server (`examples/debug_ui_smoke_server.rs`) into `.ralph/evidence/16-debug-ui-final-stop/ui-smoke/`.
- Ran strict serial gates with evidence logs: `make test-real`, `make check`, `make test`, `make test-bdd`, `make lint` all passed.
- Updated task 16 status/checklists to done+passing, wrote audit+gate-summary evidence docs, touched `.ralph/STOP`, appended a new AGENTS learning about private-interface visibility with strict clippy.
- Next after this append: run task switch script, commit all changes with required task-finished message including test evidence/challenges, then stop.
